subcodes.first_line: O dearly cherished friend! The letter was dispatched aforetime and assuredly hath by now reached thee. As to the arrival of Mr. Remey [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست عزیز نامه از پیش ارسال گشت البته تا بحال رسیده از ورود مستر ریمی و
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
